name: grounded
title: Framework 2 — grounded pipeline (self-sourcing + literature)
description: Extends gated with two capabilities: a source gate (data-finder downloads/generates the dataset from the web or an API, data-checker verifies it) and a literature gate (real prior-work review + BibTeX citations). source->audit->profile->design->literature->estimate->robustness->referee->write->reproduce.
